test.name: TC_001 — Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the secure area
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_002 — Login With Wrong Password
test.doc: Verify that an error message is displayed when login is attempted with an incorrect password
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_003 — Login With Wrong Username
test.doc: Verify that an error message is displayed when login is attempted with an incorrect username
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login
test.doc: Verify that a user can log out after a successful login and is redirected to the login page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
